hint:
Script 07 (LSTM) needs TensorFlow, jaxlib, or PyTorch. None of these publish pip wheels for Python 3.14 yet, so `pip install tensorflow` will fail.

Fix: create a Python 3.12 virtualenv, install the project + one backend, then run this script:
  python3.12 -m venv .venv312 && source .venv312/bin/activate
  pip install -r requirements.txt && pip install -e . && pip install tensorflow
  # tensorflow pins NumPy<2 on many platforms; install it last so deps resolve.
  python scripts/07_train_lstm_models.py
